packageRules.description: Schedule discord-bot updates between 3 AM and 8 PM

Hold Cilium below 1.19.2: >=1.19.2 makes the IPv6 SNAT helpers global BPF functions that need vmlinux BTF, which the Raspberry Pi OS kernel lacks — breaks the LB/L2 datapath (cilium/cilium#45224). Unpin once the node runs a BTF-enabled kernel. See apps/cilium/application.yaml.
